kirundi.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Rondera ukoresheje izina, igisobanuro, clade, canke ahantu...
kirundi.first_life_simple_microbes: Ubuzima bwa mbere — udukoko duto tworoshe
kirundi.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Ikarita y'aho ibisigazwa vya dinosaur biboneka uyu munsi, ku migabane
kirundi.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Dinosaurs nyinshi zabitswe zifite amababa, kuva ku vyoya vyoroshe kugeza ku mababa nyayo yo guhaguruka. Nyinshi zari zifite amababa igihe kirekire mbere y'uko n'imwe muri zo ishobora guhaguruka.
kirundi.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Inyoni zifite furcula, canke igufwa ry'icifuzo. Dinosaurs za theropod nka T. rex na Velociraptor na zo zari zizifite. Ni igufwa rimwe nyabwo.
kirundi.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Amagufwa y'inyoni aroroshe kandi yuzuyemo udusakoshi tw'umwuka. Amagufwa amwe yuzuyemo umwuka agaragara muri dinosaurs nyinshi, igice c'uburyo bwo guhumeka busa n'ubw'inyoni.
kirundi.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Ikirenge c'inyoni gisanzwe, intoki eshatu imbere, gihuye n'ibirenge vya theropod. Ibirenge vy'ibisigazwa vya dinosaur bigaragara nk'ibirenge binini vy'inyoni.
kirundi.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Dinosaurs zabikaga amagi mu vyari maze zimwe, nka Citipati na Oviraptor, zicaraga hejuru yayo zororera abana bazo, nk'uko inyoni zibikora.
kirundi.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Impeta z'ukura mu magufwa ya dinosaur zerekana ko nyinshi zakuze vuba kandi zifite amaraso ashushe, zisa n'inyoni n'inyamabere kurusha ibikururuka vya none.
